title: Crunchy American Beef Sliders
description: A low-carb-friendly American dish featuring a bitter and pillowy beef patty, served on a tagliere with a side of nimono-simmered vegetables, perfect for a energizing snack or lunch.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Form the ground beef into 4 patties and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit.
Meanwhile, toast the almond flour buns on the grill or in a toaster.
Assemble the sliders by spreading a layer of nimono-simmer sauce on the bottom bun, followed by a beef patty, a slice of cheese, a few slices of bacon, some shredded lettuce, and a slice of tomato.
Top with the top bun and serve immediately.
Serve the sliders on a tagliere with a side of nimono-simmered vegetables, such as carrots and green beans.
Drizzle the nimono-simmer sauce over the vegetables and serve hot.
